task_completion.description: Enter the correct sale details in JStock
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sell dialog in JStock is open showing NVDA, 10 shares, a price of 950.00, date set to Dec 15, 2024, and 0 fees.

task_completion.description: Confirm and execute the sale in JStock
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock portfolio or transaction history reflects the sale, such as showing NVDA with 15 shares remaining or a completed sell transaction.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to create the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Mousepad, Gedit, Nano, Vim) is open showing the file name 'tax_lot_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Include required labels in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains clear labels for 'Cost Basis', 'Sale Proceeds', 'Realized Gain', and 'Remaining shares'.

task_completion.description: Document the correct calculated values in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report shows the correct values: Cost Basis of 6153 (or 6153.00), Sale Proceeds of 9500 (or 9500.00), Realized Gain of 3347 (or 3347.00), and 15 remaining shares.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the JStock application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JStock GUI open and being used to record the transaction, rather than just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is seen being edited in an interactive text editor (GUI or terminal-based like nano/vim), not just generated via a background script or echo command.
